creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Don Lewis from comment #17)
> A significant number of the skipped ports are due to a build failure in
> math/py-numpy, which is not boost related and happens even in the baseline.  I > don't know why this port is failing for me because the portsmon build is clean.

I had a similar problem and now it's fixed.  If you're running head, you may try to update world and rebuild lang/python27 (or your default python).  Basically, we briefly had some issues on head after Clang & libc++ import.  FYI...
